exit_load: Exit load of 1% if redeemed within 30 days.
benchmark: BSE India Infrastructure Total Return Index
about_fund:
About HDFC Infrastructure Fund Direct Growth HDFC Infrastructure Fund Direct Growth is a Equity Mutual Fund Scheme launched by HDFC Mutual Fund. This scheme was made available to investors on 10 Dec 1999. Dhruv Muchhal is the Current Fund Manager of HDFC Infrastructure Fund Direct Growth fund. The fund currently has an Asset Under Management(AUM) of ₹9,37,048 Cr and the Latest NAV as of 04 Jun 2026 is ₹51.72.
The HDFC Infrastructure Fund Direct Growth is rated Very High risk. Minimum SIP Investment is set to ₹100. Minimum Lumpsum Investment is ₹100. Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 30 days.
